hero.headline: The art of detail.
hero.subheadline: Your premium grooming experience. The excellence of traditional hairdressing and shaving in the heart of Marrakech.

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: The Art of Grooming
services.desc: Discover our premium service menu. From classic haircuts to traditional old-school shaves, every service is a bespoke experience.

coupe.name: Stylish Haircut
coupe.desc: Consultation, shampoo, tailored scissors or clippers cut, styling and premium finish.

barbe.name: Beard Trim
barbe.desc: Precise lining, scissors trim, straight-razor contouring, and nourishing oil application.

proteine.name: Protein Treatment
proteine.desc: Deep repairing and smoothing treatment for silky, shiny, and perfectly disciplined hair.

gommage.name: Facial Scrub
gommage.desc: Gentle exfoliation to remove dead cells, purify pores, and revive the complexion, completed with a massage.

pack.title: The Full Package
pack.desc: The ultimate grooming experience. A moment of absolute relaxation combining all our expert treatments for a perfect result.

philosophy.subtitle: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: The Heritage of Craftsmanship
philosophy.desc1: At Barber Chehban, we don't just cut hair. We perpetuate a tradition of excellence where every detail matters.
philosophy.desc2: Our shop in Massira 2 is designed as a true club for modern gentlemen. A place where technical expertise meets flawless service in a luxurious and relaxed atmosphere.

team.subtitle: The Expertise
team.title: Our Master Barbers
team.desc: Passionate artisans, masters in the art of haircutting and traditional shaving. Discover the talents who will take care of you.

gallery.subtitle: Portfolio
gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.desc: A selection of our latest haircuts and beard trims. The excellence of our craftsmanship in pictures.

location.subtitle: Find Us
location.title: The Barbershop
location.desc: Located in the heart of Massira 2, our shop welcomes you in an elegant and masculine setting, designed for your utmost comfort.

booking.subtitle: Book an Appointment
booking.title: Secure your Slot
booking.desc: Connect directly with our team via WhatsApp for real-time confirmation. Excellence doesn't wait.

form.whatsapp_message: Hello, I would like to book an appointment with {barber} for: {slot}. Name: {name}. Phone: {phone}

footer.desc: The ultimate destination for demanding gentlemen in Marrakech. Haircuts, beards, and treatments in a premium setting.
